name: Atheros Communications, Inc.
description: Atheros Communications, Inc. was a developer of semiconductor system solutions for wireless and other network communications. The company was a pioneer in the development of high-performance semiconductor solutions for wireless networks, particularly IEEE 802.11 (Wi-Fi) chipsets. Atheros chipsets were widely used by major manufacturers of wireless access points, routers, and client devices. In May 2011, Atheros was acquired by Qualcomm Incorporated for approximately $3.1 billion, becoming a wholly owned subsidiary named Qualcomm Atheros.
